title: Notifications
scope: Cross-app notification fan-out: every 'tell the user X' event is recorded as a notification row, then a background delivery loop pushes it out over the configured channels (Discord DM, Pushover, WebSocket, chat log, FCM mobile push). The shared delivery layer every app uses. NOT the message content owners (each app is) — Notifications owns recording + delivery.

specs.title: Record & deliver a notification
specs.behavior: A notification event is recorded as a row, then the background delivery loop sends it to the user over each configured/available channel (Discord DM, Pushover, WebSocket, chat log, FCM), marking it delivered once any channel succeeds.

specs.title: List recent notifications
specs.behavior: Listing returns recent notifications delivered by the system.
